sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93770" key="shkhko/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σηκηκόρος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σηκοκόρος</foreign>, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βόκορος</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:151" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.151</biblScope></bibl>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
